mapper.select:
SELECT user_id AS userId, nickname, avatar FROM user WHERE user_id IN
#{id}

SELECT user_id AS userId, nickname, email, avatar FROM user WHERE status = '0' AND user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND (nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY user_id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE status = '0' AND user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND (nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
